root_nodes.title: Ethio Telecom
root_nodes.summary: The statement of profit or loss and other comprehensive income for the year ended 30 June 2022 shows revenue from contracts with customers of Birr 59,448,361,000, with operating expenses of Birr 20,872,135,000 and a finance cost net of Birr 6,948,505,000, resulting in a profit after tax of Birr 8,999,582,000. Other comprehensive income included a remeasurement gain on employment benefits obligations of Birr 91,576,000 and deferred tax adjustments, leading to total comprehensive income for the year of Birr 9,063,685,000. The figures reflect increases compared to the prior year, indicating improved performance.

root_nodes.title: Non current assets
root_nodes.summary: The document section presents a breakdown of assets including right of use assets valued at $38,857,822, intangible assets at $1,608,350, and other assets totaling $1,354,309. Notes receivable and deferred tax assets are also listed with values of $7,101,635 and $497,183 respectively. The total assets amount to $189,017,711.

root_nodes.title: Non-current liabilities
root_nodes.summary: This section covers non-current liabilities, which are long-term financial obligations that a company expects to settle beyond one year. The reported figures range from approximately 45 birr for some smaller provisions to over 69 million birr for total current liabilities, with major categories including borrowings, lease liabilities, contract liabilities, and trade payables. The total liabilities across both periods amount to approximately 76-87 million birr.
